name: Emanation (Joy)
scaffolding_intent: Emits sparkle/joy particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong emotion — the entity actually feels happy, excited, proud, or amazed
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels happy, excited, proud, or amazed
